code:
%%{init: {'theme':'base','themeVariables':{ 'primaryColor':'#ff8b00','edgeLabelBackground':'#ffffff','tertiaryColor':'#fef3c7'}}}%%

stateDiagram-v2
title: SM-10.02 — Transparency Report Lifecycle (C2-10 Security & Audit)

[*] --> DRAFT : ReportInitiated
note right of DRAFT
  Create report shell:
  • incident/ref IDs bound
  • scope, timeline, owners
  • initial checklist opened
end note

DRAFT --> DATA_GATHER : EvidenceRequested
note right of DATA_GATHER
  Collect evidence:
  • SIEM logs, ledger snapshots
  • config diffs, patches
  • governance directives
end note

DATA_GATHER --> AUTHORING : EvidenceCollected
note right of AUTHORING
  Compile narrative:
  • root cause, impact, fixes
  • timelines & tables
  • redactions planned
end note

AUTHORING --> LEGAL_REVIEW : DraftReady
LEGAL_REVIEW --> ETHICS_REVIEW : LegalCleared
ETHICS_REVIEW --> QA_REVIEW : EthicsCleared
QA_REVIEW --> SIGNING : QAApproved

%% Signing & generation
SIGNING --> GENERATED : ReportGenerated (DDD EVT 94)
note right of GENERATED
  Immutable bundle produced:
  • hashes, signatures, timestamp
  • public & internal versions
end note

GENERATED --> PUBLISHING : PublishRequested
PUBLISHING --> PUBLISHED : TransparencyReportPublished (DDD EVT 92)
PUBLISHED --> ARCHIVED : ArchiveScheduled
ARCHIVED --> [*]

%% Corrections / amendments
PUBLISHED --> AMEND_REQ : CorrectionRequested
AMEND_REQ --> AUTHORING : AmendmentAuthorized

%% Exceptions / failure paths
DATA_GATHER --> FAILED : MissingEvidence / HashMismatch
AUTHORING --> FAILED : IncompleteNarrative
LEGAL_REVIEW --> FAILED : LegalBlock
ETHICS_REVIEW --> FAILED : EthicsBlock
QA_REVIEW --> FAILED : QAFailed
SIGNING --> FAILED : SignatureError
PUBLISHING --> FAILED : PublishError
FAILED --> [*] : ReportAbandoned

%% ===== Styling =====
classDef core fill:#ff8b00,stroke:#333,color:#fff,font-weight:bold;
class DRAFT,DATA_GATHER,AUTHORING,LEGAL_REVIEW,ETHICS_REVIEW,QA_REVIEW,SIGNING,GENERATED,PUBLISHING,PUBLISHED,ARCHIVED,AMEND_REQ,FAILED core;
repo_description: The cohersphere architecture — structural blueprint of the resonance network. Defines the modular layers connecting app, API, and governance protocols. Outlines data flows for Proof-of-Contribution, c

cscw_dialogue.utterance: 我们需要为C2-10安全审计模块设计一个透明度报告的全生命周期流程。核心是从报告创建到最终归档的完整链路，中间要有证据收集、编写、多轮审核，最后生成不可篡改的发布版本。另外还得考虑发布后如果发现错误需要修正，以及各环节可能失败的情况。
明白，这个流程涉及合规要求。我梳理一下：起点是DRAFT状态，然后进入DATA_GATHER收集SIEM日志等证据，再到AUTHORING编写报告内容。审核环节我看到有法务LEGAL_REVIEW和伦理ETHICS_REVIEW两轮，之后是QA_REVIEW，对吗？另外SIGNING之后GENERATED状态要触发DDD EVT 94事件？
对的，GENERATED那个节点很关键，一旦报告包生成，哈希、签名、时间戳全部固化，内部版和公开版同时产出。然后进入PUBLISHING，正式发布时触发DDD EVT 92。PUBLISHED之后不是直接结束，要先走ARCHIVED再终结。
关于修正机制，我理解是PUBLISHED之后如果发现内容有问题，要走到AMEND_REQ状态，授权后再回到AUTHORING重新编写，对吗？这样形成一个闭环，而不是直接废弃。
没错，AmendmentAuthorized这个转换很重要，不是谁都能改已发布报告，必须有明确授权。另外失败路径也要画全——DATA_GATHER可能遇到MissingEvidence或HashMismatch直接进FAILED，AUTHORING可能IncompleteNarrative，LEGAL_REVIEW和ETHICS_REVIEW也都有各自的阻断状态。
好，我把失败分支补全了：QA_REVIEW对应QAFailed，SIGNING对应SignatureError，PUBLISHING对应PublishError。所有FAILED最终都指向终结态，标注为ReportAbandoned。
各状态的备注内容我也确认一下：DRAFT要体现incident/ref IDs绑定和初始检查单；DATA_GATHER列清楚SIEM日志、账本快照、配置差异这些；AUTHORING要包含根因分析、影响评估、修复措施，还有脱敏计划；GENERATED强调不可篡改包的特性。
全部核对完毕。标题用SM-10.02 — Transparency Report Lifecycle (C2-10 Security & Audit)，核心状态用橙色高亮。流程覆盖了从报告发起、证据收集、多轮审核、签名生成、发布、归档，到修正回环和完整的异常退出机制。
